preamble: Epenthesis of the pharyngeal fricative [ʕ] (ain) is a rare phonological process, primarily documented in certain Arabic dialects and Somali to resolve vowel hiatus.

examples.note: Dialectal pharyngeal insertion at vowel hiatus; the [ʕ] resolves the V-V sequence.
Insertion of pharyngeal [ʕ] to resolve vowel hiatus. Specific lexical examples not provided in source; flagged for verification.
